ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "total_winnings" REAL /* Total winnings across all tournaments */,
  "total_buy_ins" REAL /* Total buy-ins across all tournaments */,
  "total_tournaments" INTEGER /* Total number of tournaments participated in */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the platform */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player's profile was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., single-table, multi-table) */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool available */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name or ID of the tournament organizer */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the tournament */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "winnings" REAL /* Winnings in the tournament */,
  "buy_in" REAL /* Buy-in amount for the tournament */,
  "vpip" TEXT /* Voluntarily Put In Pot (VPIP) percentage */,
  "pfr" TEXT /* Pre-Flop Raise (PFR) percentage */,
  "eph" TEXT /* Effective Hands Per Hour (EPH) */,
  "seat_number" INTEGER /* Seat number at the table */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the player in the tournament */,
  "time_played" TEXT /* Total time the player was active in the tournament */,
  "hands_played" INTEGER /* Total number of hands played by the player */,
  "blinds_level" INTEGER /* The level of blinds at which the player finished */,
  "rebuys" INTEGER /* Number of rebuys the player made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_records_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the table belongs to */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "max_seats" INTEGER /* Maximum number of seats at the table */,
  "table_type" TEXT /* Type of table (e.g., cash, tournament) */,
  "blinds_schedule" TEXT /* Details of the blinds schedule for the table */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seating" (
  "seating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seating arrangement */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "seat_number" INTEGER /* Seat number at the table */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player took the seat */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player left the seat */,
  "buy_in_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player bought in */,
  "chips" INTEGER /* Number of chips the player started with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)
